text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 213 

PRSN_CLM_IND 

LABEL: Indicator of a Claim for a Person 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that the claim is for a person and not a service tracking claim or a non-person claim. 

SHORT NAME: PRSN_CLM_IND 

LONG NAME: PRSN_CLM_IND 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): All header claim Files 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = Not a claim for a person; one (or more) of four non-person
